## Findings
- [ ] **[BLOCK][Docs] README "Status" section understates shipped functionality**
  - **Status quo:** `README.md:66-72` lists as "not done yet": DIN 5008 letter geometry validated against KOMA-Script, veraPDF CI gating, and brand fonts. All three shipped: DIN 5008 geometry validation landed in `5b64c5c` (#7, "docs: validate DIN 5008 geometry against KOMA-Script source"), veraPDF CI gating landed in the same commit (`ci: add veraPDF validation for PDF/A-2a + PDF/UA-1`, also confirmed live in `.github/workflows/ci.yml:85-93`), and brand fonts landed in `8400417` (#28, "Embed brand fonts via go:embed for machine-independent output"). Only `rechnung` VAT/GiroCode and the pandoc/WeasyPrint fallback path are still genuinely pending (confirmed: `internal/assets/templates/rechnung.typ:4-5` explicitly says VAT/GiroCode is "Phase 4 work", and the CLI help still labels it "scaffold").
  - **Likely cause:** The "not done yet" list was written before this work landed and was never revisited as PRs merged.
  - **Proposed solution:** Move DIN 5008 validation, veraPDF CI gating, and brand fonts out of the "not done yet" list into the "What works today" list (or drop them from "not done yet" entirely); keep only `rechnung` VAT/GiroCode, more profiles, and the pandoc/WeasyPrint fallback as pending.
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review`

- [ ] **[BLOCK][Docs] architecture.md Phase 2 missing a completion marker**
  - **Status quo:** `docs/architecture.md:230-231` ("Embed brand fonts via `go:embed`; pass `--font-path` + `--ignore-system-fonts` for machine-independent output; ship a sans face for DIN sub-10pt text.") has no ✅ marker, unlike the two completed Phase 1 items directly above it (lines 222, 224). This work is done: `8400417` (#28) added `internal/assets/fonts/`, wired `go:embed`, and added the `--font-path` CLI flag confirmed in `cmd/symprint`.
  - **Likely cause:** Same root cause as the README finding — the roadmap wasn't updated when the PR merged.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add a ✅ marker to the brand-fonts roadmap line, consistent with how Phase 1 items were marked done.
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review`

## Applied mechanical fixes (default mode)
- `README.md:55` self-version reference `v0.1.0-dev` → `v0.1.0`

## Next step
- gate=blocked → resolve the BLOCK findings via `/02-gh-plan --from-review`, then re-run `/06-gh-prerelease`
